description: Frozen corpus promoting the in-product docs/help browser CONTENT surface to beta. Each case is a DocsBrowserRowCard projection that proves a docs entry is wired to the same release truth the sibling public-truth surfaces (migration center, Help/About, service health) read: it cites the current claim manifest and compatibility report, binds through the docs_site channel, and never claims fresher freshness or a more exact build match than the release truth allows. Degraded or stale entries carry an explicit freshness label rather than silently downgrading. release_truth_binding is the snapshot of the DocsBrowser surface binding in crates/aureline-shell/src/docs_browser/truth_wiring.rs; the Rust replay asserts it equals the live seeded_truth_wiring_report binding, and ci/check_beta_docs_browser_content.py re-derives it from the release artifacts and re-derives every label vocabulary from crate source, failing closed on drift.
